doctrine: The future only moves when evidence deserves it.
mutation_policy: Chat may propose actions but performs no writes in 4G.
confirmation_policy: Every proposed action must require confirm, edit, or cancel. Confirm and edit are display-only in 4G.
evidence_policy: Evidence impact is only possible after a confirmed ledger write. Chat suggestions alone are not evidence.
memory_policy: No durable chat memory is added in 4G. Structured memory remains in linked records.
future_movement_policy: Future movement remains unchanged until evidence-weighted ledger events are evaluated by a later movement layer.
prohibited_behaviors: No automatic mutation from natural language.
No Outcome Ledger event creation from chat in 4G.
No One Move status update from chat in 4G.
No generated strategy mutation from chat in 4G.
No future movement claim without evidence.
No raw dossier, raw answer, Redis key, env var, prompt, raw model output, or raw error exposure.
limits: No subscriptions, Stripe, or RRG runtime added.
No canonical profile or assessment records changed.
No generated strategy, One Move status, or Outcome Ledger mutation from chat.
